lockingPolicy.lockReason: Regression scenarios encode the 429/Retry-After/bounded-backoff contract for the shared DoWithRetry helper and 9 migrated call sites (7 alerts sources + OAuthAPIGet + markets); any future change requires explicit invalidation evidence per Gate G058/G059.

tdd.rationale: This IS a code change across ~5–6 Go files (helpers.go + alerts.go + markets + tests); NOT artifact-only. Red→Green evidence mandatory per bubbles.implement dispatch.
tdd.redGreenEvidence: Red: per-connector httptest regression for at least one alerts source, OAuthAPIGet, and markets MUST FAIL against pre-fix tree (server hit count == 1, error string contains 'HTTP 429'). Green: after adding DoWithRetry and migrating call sites, all per-connector regressions PASS (hit count == 2, hit-2 payload parsed) and the full Go unit suite via ./smackerel.sh test unit --go passes.

scenarios.title: DoWithRetry honors Retry-After delta-seconds
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: httptest server returns 429 + Retry-After: 1 on hit 1 and 200 on hit 2; assert exactly 2 hits, elapsed >= 1s, hit-2 body returned to caller.

scenarios.title: DoWithRetry honors Retry-After HTTP-date
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: httptest server returns 429 + Retry-After HTTP-date 2s in future on hit 1, 200 on hit 2; assert exactly 2 hits, elapsed ~2s (±500ms), hit-2 body returned.

scenarios.title: DoWithRetry bounds retries by MaxAttempts (adversarial)
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: httptest server returns 429 + Retry-After: 0 forever; assert exactly MaxAttempts hits, error == 'rate limited: max retries exceeded', total elapsed bounded by MaxAttempts * MaxDelay.

scenarios.title: DoWithRetry respects ctx.Done() while sleeping
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: httptest server returns 429 + Retry-After: 60; ctx cancelled 100ms after DoWithRetry invocation; assert return within 200ms with err == ctx.Err().

scenarios.title: parseRetryAfter accepts delta-seconds and HTTP-date forms
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Table test: '60' -> (60s, true); HTTP-date future -> positive duration with ok=true; HTTP-date past -> (0, true); '' -> (0, false); 'garbage' -> (0, false).

scenarios.title: All 7 alerts sources honor 429 via DoWithRetry
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: For each alerts source, httptest server returns 429 + Retry-After: 1 on hit 1 and a valid source-shaped payload on hit 2; assert exactly 2 hits, hit-2 payload parsed without error.

scenarios.title: OAuthAPIGet honors 429 via DoWithRetry
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: httptest server validates Bearer header; returns 429 + Retry-After: 1 on hit 1 and valid JSON on hit 2; assert exactly 2 hits, decoded JSON returned.

scenarios.title: Markets connector honors 429 via DoWithRetry
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: httptest server returns 429 + Retry-After: 1 on hit 1 and a valid markets payload on hit 2; assert exactly 2 hits, parsed payload returned (replaces existing L561 opaque-error assertion).

scenarios.title: connector_429_total metric increments per 429 event
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: After DoWithRetry runs against a 429-then-200 server, assert connector_429_total{connector=<label>,outcome='retry'} increments per retry attempt and outcome='recovered' increments once; against an always-429 server, outcome='exhausted' increments once.
